description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier — discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Multi-tenant social-identity control plane for the ORGANVM distribution layer — single source of truth for per-repo voice, channels, credentials, and cadence; enables one publishing pipeline to serve N products.
ranked.first_task: Ship profiles/profile.schema.json and wire `kerygma-profiles validate` into CI as a required gate, turning the produces->ORGAN-IV edge into a machine-checked contract.

ranked.value: Holds the formal behavioral economics models, game-theoretic peer audit proofs, and core calibration constants (e.g., loss aversion λ = 1.955) that justify the spoof-resistance of the live Styx peer-audited behavioral blockchain.
ranked.first_task: Publish a formal specification document derived from the game-theoretic accountability models to serve as the definitive trust anchor for the live Styx Commerce UI.
